account.title: Current account
account.guestEmail: Not using account mode right now
account.profileHelper: View and update your own personal details.
account.deviceModeHelper: The app is using device authorization, so personal profile is hidden.

language.description: Change the app display language and apply it immediately.

updates.title: App updates
updates.description: The app downloads available updates silently and applies them the next time it opens.

device.title: Device registration
device.description: Only store manager accounts can submit device registrations. After submission, an admin must enable the device before this device can enter the app directly on the next launch.
device.helper: Select a store before registering this device.
device.ready: This device is enabled. Next time the app opens, it can enter directly.

printer.title: Label printer
printer.description: Scan and save the Bluetooth label printer used by product maintenance.
printer.notSelected: No label printer has been selected yet.
printer.empty: No Bluetooth printer was found. Make sure the printer is on and nearby.
printer.emptyFiltered: No XP-prefixed device was found. Turn off the filter to show all devices.

dialogs.logoutMessage: Log out of the current account?
dialogs.selectStoreMessage: A store must be selected before device registration.
dialogs.registerSuccessMessage: This device is bound to {{store}} with status {{status}}. Once an admin enables it, the device can enter the app directly next time.
dialogs.registerExistingMessage: This device is already registered to {{store}} with status {{status}}. The existing device session has been synced on this device; once it is enabled, reopening the app can enter directly.
dialogs.registerFailedMessage: Device registration failed. Please try again later.
dialogs.refreshReadyMessage: This device is enabled. Next time the app opens, it can enter directly.
dialogs.refreshPendingMessage: This device cannot enter the app directly yet. Please wait for backend approval or check its status.
dialogs.refreshFailedMessage: Failed to refresh the device status. Please try again later.
dialogs.unbindDeviceMessage: This clears the local device session and marks the backend device record as unregistered. Continue?
dialogs.rebindDeviceMessage: Rebinding first unbinds the current device, then returns to login so you can register it again. Continue?
dialogs.unbindDeviceFailedMessage: Failed to unbind the device. Please try again later.
dialogs.printerSavedMessage: {{printer}} has been saved as the label printer.
dialogs.printerTestSuccessMessage: The label printer received the test job.
dialogs.printerClearedMessage: The saved label printer has been removed.
dialogs.updateDownloadedMessage: The new app update has been downloaded and will apply the next time the app opens.
dialogs.updateNotAvailableMessage: No update is available right now.
dialogs.updateDisabledMessage: Development mode cannot check OTA updates. Use a preview or production build to verify.
dialogs.updateConfigurationDisabledMessage: This build has OTA updates disabled. Check updates.url, runtimeVersion, and native configuration before rebuilding.
dialogs.updateCheckFailedMessage: Failed to check for updates. Please try again later.

messages.profileLoginRequired: Sign in with an account before opening your profile.
